title: 3facedme's trailer recreation
description: TRIALER TRAILER you dont need to reed this
body: this is my attempt att recreating the minecraft trailer visuals becouse… everyone needs to agree that the minecraft trailer look 10 times better than the real game. When i bought minecraft i thought it was going to look like the trailers but when i opened the game… Lets just say i didn’t like it. So i took everything i could find and made this modpack. Hope you enjoy it!
